info.name: CRM API
info.description:
Backend API for CRM (**Flask**). Set {{baseUrl}} (e.g. http://localhost:5000). Use **Login** to set {{token}}; send **Authorization: Bearer {{token}}** on protected routes.

_Last updated: 2025-06-18 — full backend sync (275 routes); Lunch multi-poll, global admin bypass, vote history per poll._

_Original note: aligns with Flask blueprints in `app/api/` (RBAC batch, attendance, Credentials, RFQ reopen/history, **Companies** JSON bulk `POST /api/companies/bulk` and Excel **multipart** `POST /api/companies/bulk-upload` — requires `openpyxl` on the server)._

## RBAC
- **Global role `admin`**: full JWT access to most routes; **sidebar/nav** still uses **explicit RBAC** (`GET /api/rbac/me` → `navPageKeys`) except global admins see all modules.
- **Per-module access** (`sales`, `tasks`, `leaves`, `credentials`, `rfq`, …): enforced per endpoint. Typical scopes:
  - **Sales** (`pageKey: sales`): **full scope** = global admin *or* RBAC **admin** column for Sales → all funnel deals, orders, renewals. **User scope** = funnel/renewals where **company KAM** is you; **orders** only if **assignTo** or **forwardedTo** is you.
  - **Leaves** (`pageKey: leaves`): RBAC **admin** vs **user** treated the same for data scope; **extra visibility** via **HR module** (`can_access_page(hr)`) or **reporting manager** (`/api/leaves/team`, approve/reject).
  - **Credentials** (`pageKey: credentials`): module access required on all endpoints; reveal/share/write have stricter policy checks.
  - **RFQ** (`pageKey: rfq`): creator + pricing assignee + RFQ admins by state; reopen/history available after approval with versioning.
- **RBAC API** (`/api/rbac/*`): most routes require **global admin** (`require_admin`), not only a matrix cell.
- **Batch assign**: `POST /api/rbac/assignments/batch` assigns **multiple userIds** to one `pageKey` with the same `accessType`.

## Resources
Auth, **RBAC**, Users, Companies (CRUD + bulk JSON + Excel upload), Contacts, Tasks, **Sales** (funnel), **Orders**, **Renewals**, Notifications, Shifts, **Attendance** (including **reconciliations**), **Leaves**, HR, Status config, Company profile, Currencies, Expense purposes, Expenses (bin/restore), Account particulars, Accounts, Departments, Designations, **Credentials**, **RFQ**, **Lunch**, **PMS**, **PMS Project Types**, **Report Automations**, **Employee Types**.

## Companies import
- **`POST /api/companies/bulk`**: JSON body `items[]` (max 2000). `currencyCode`+`kamUserName` supported.
- **`POST /api/companies/bulk-upload`**: `multipart/form-data` — field **`file`** (`*.xlsx` / `*.xlsm`). Form fields: `currencyCode` (default **BDT**), `skipDuplicates`, `stopOnError`. First sheet row 1 = headers (Name, KeyAccountManager, Location, Country/County). **200** adds `excel` `{ fileName, rowsRead, currencyCode, currencyId }`.

## Leaves
- **Balances** `GET/PUT /api/leaves/balances/:userId`: **self**, **HR module access**, or employee’s **reporting manager** (not global-admin-only).
- **Apply**: `durationType`: `single_day` | `half_day` | `multiple_day`; `half_day` needs `halfDayPeriod`: `first_half` | `second_half`.
- **All leaves** `GET /api/leaves/all`: **global admin OR HR module access** (HR calendar).
- **Approve / reject**: **HR** or **reporting manager** for that employee (not global admin alone).
- **Leave types / weekends / holidays** (mutations): **global admin OR HR module access** (`require_admin_or_hr_access`).

## Attendance
Users need **shift** on HR. Without shift: `GET /api/attendance/today` may return `hasShiftAssigned: false`; check-in/out can return **422**.
**Reconciliations** (late/absence disputes): `GET/POST /api/attendance/reconciliations`, `PATCH /api/attendance/reconciliations/:id/review` — require **Attendance** module access; reviewers per `require_attendance_reconciliation_review` (typically attendance admin scope / HR).

## Global admin bypass
- **`User.role === "admin"`** bypasses per-page RBAC for **module access** and **admin scope** on Lunch, PMS nav, and similar checks. RBAC matrix API still requires global admin where noted.

## Lunch (`pageKey: lunch`)
- **Access**: global admin OR Lunch RBAC user/admin column.
- **Admin actions**: global admin OR Lunch RBAC **admin** — manage any poll (not creator-only). Unlimited polls per day.
- **Notifications**: creating poll notifies all Lunch module users; links to `/lunch`.
- **Vote history**: one row per poll; includes `pollTitle`. Query `from`/`to`, optional `optionType`, admin `userId` or `all`.

## PMS (`pageKey: pms`)
- Permission hints: `GET /api/pms/permissions`.
- Tasks/kanban: `mine=true` filters to current user.
- Soft delete + restore; sprints, attachments, resource view.

## Employee Types
- `GET /api/employee-types` — any authenticated user.
- Mutations — global admin OR HR module access.

## Report Automations
- Global admin OR HR module access. Cron-scheduled reports + manual send + execution log download.

item.name: Companies
item.description:
**CRUD** `GET|POST /api/companies`, `GET|PUT|DELETE /api/companies/:id`.

**Bulk JSON** — `POST /api/companies/bulk`: body `{ items, skipDuplicates?, stopOnError? }`.

**Bulk Excel** — `POST /api/companies/bulk-upload`: `multipart/form-data` with **`file`**. Server resolves **BDT** (or `currencyCode`) from `currencies` table; KAM column → `users.name` match. Same `summary`/`results` as JSON bulk; successful **200** includes **`excel`** metadata.

request.description: Query params: search, country, kamUserId (optional).
currencyId and kamUserId required. Get currencyId from GET /api/currencies.

**POST /api/companies/bulk** — Requires Companies module access (same as single create).

**Body (root):**
- `items` (required): array, max 2000 objects.
- `skipDuplicates` (optional, default `true`): if a row matches an existing **name + country** (normalized) or repeats in the same batch, status `skipped` with `reason: duplicate`.
- `stopOnError` (optional, default `false`): if `true`, returns **400** with no DB inserts when **any** row fails validation (skipped rows do not count as errors).

**Each item:**
- Required: `name`, `location`, `country`.
- Currency: **`currencyId`** OR **`currencyCode`** (e.g. `BDT`; case-insensitive match).
- KAM: **`kamUserId`** OR **`kamEmail`** OR **`kamUserName`** (lowercased full name match; must resolve to exactly one user).

**200 response:**
```json
{
  "summary": { "created": 2, "skipped": 0, "errors": 0 },
  "results": [
    { "index": 0, "status": "created", "company": { "id": "...", "name": "...", ... } },
    { "index": 1, "status": "skipped", "reason": "duplicate", "name": "...", "country": "..." },
    { "index": 2, "status": "error", "error": "..." }
  ]
}
```
`results` is sorted by `index`.

formdata.description: Required. First worksheet: row 1 = headers. Columns: Name; KeyAccountManager (or KAM); Location; Country or County. Data rows below. Max 2000 rows.
Optional. If true, skip duplicate name+country (default true).
Optional. If true, abort with 400 if any row fails validation (no inserts).
Optional; default BDT. Must exist in GET /api/currencies (e.g. code BDT).

request.description:
**POST /api/companies/bulk-upload**

**Auth:** Companies module access (same as create company).
**Content-Type:** Do not set manually — use **form-data** (Postman sets `multipart/form-data` + boundary).

**Form fields:**
| Field | Required | Notes |
|-------|----------|--------|
| `file` | Yes | `.xlsx` or `.xlsm` |
| `currencyCode` | No | Default `BDT`; looked up in `currencies` |
| `skipDuplicates` | No | `true` / `false` (default true) |
| `stopOnError` | No | `true` / `false` (default false) |

**Behavior:**
- Parses **first sheet**; **row 1** = header row.
- Resolves currency id from **`currencyCode`** for **every** row.
- Maps **KeyAccountManager** / **KAM** to **KAM user id** by matching **`users.name`** (case/spacing normalized; must be exactly one user).

**200 response:**
```json
{
  "summary": { "created": 0, "skipped": 0, "errors": 0 },
  "results": [ { "index": 0, "status": "created", "company": { } } ],
  "excel": {
    "fileName": "companies.xlsx",
    "rowsRead": 33,
    "currencyCode": "BDT",
    "currencyId": "..."
  }
}
```

**Errors:** `400` — missing file, bad Excel, unknown `currencyCode`, no data rows; `401`/`403` — auth/RBAC.
Replace {{companyId}}.
Replace {{companyId}}. currencyId optional.
Replace {{companyId}}. currencyId optional. Also supports PATCH.
Replace {{companyId}}.
Query params: companyId, search (optional).
name, companyId, mobile required.
Replace {{contactId}}.
Replace {{contactId}}.
Replace {{contactId}}. Also supports PATCH.
Replace {{contactId}}.

title, companyId, dueDatetime required. dueDatetime: ISO 8601.

item.name: Orders
item.description: Sales orders. Requires **Sales module** access (`403` if none). **Full scope** (global admin or Sales RBAC admin): all orders + filters. **User scope**: only orders where you are **assignTo** or **forwardedTo**.

request.description: Query: companyId, salesId, status, nextAction, deliveryDateFrom/To, nextActionDateFrom/To. Full scope only: assignToUserId (or legacy assignTo) filter.

Requires company **KAM** = you unless full Sales scope. `createdByUserId` set by server. Optional `finalizeCloseWon` + `closedWonStatus` to close the linked deal. `attachments`: array of { fileName, data } data URLs.
Update status / next to do / next action date / forward. Values must match active Status config. **forwardedTo**: full scope, assignee, or current forward target only.

item.name: Renewals
item.description: Renewal pipeline. Same **Sales** RBAC as funnel (`403` without Sales). **Full scope**: all renewals. **User scope**: rows where **kamUserId** snapshot = you.

request.description: Optional filters. User scope ignores other users’ rows.
Company must be one you can access as **KAM** (unless full scope). `kamUserId` stored from company.

item.name: Shifts
item.description: Employees should be assigned to a shift for attendance. Create/update shifts with `employeeIds` or use **Assign shift**.

request.description: Get all configured shifts.
Admin only. Create a new shift. weekendDays: 0=Mon, 6=Sun.
Admin only. Update shift details and employee assignments.
Admin only. Deletes the shift and clears shift assignment for any employees on it.
Admin only. Assign a user to a shift (or remove if shiftId is null).

item.name: Attendance
item.description:
Check-in and check-out require an **assigned shift** (see HR / Shifts). If the user has no shift: GET /today returns `status: no_shift` and `hasShiftAssigned: false`; POST check-in or check-out returns **422** with `{ "error": "..." }`.

**Reconciliations**: applicants create requests (`POST` with `attendanceId`, `reason`); list with `GET` (`status`, `userId`, `dateFrom`, `dateTo` for admins); managers review with `PATCH .../review` (`status`: `approved` | `rejected`, optional `reviewNote`).

request.description: Today's row for the current user. Includes `hasShiftAssigned`, `isWeekend`, `isHoliday` when synthetic. If no shift and no row: `status` may be `no_shift`.
Body: `location` (required). Late/present uses the user's **shift** start + grace. **422** if not assigned to a shift. **400** if weekend for shift or already checked in.
Body: `location` (required). Must have checked in first. **422** if not assigned to a shift.
Same as other periods; `period=today` returns today's record(s) for the current user after ensuring rows exist for the range.
Get attendance records for the current user. Query **period**: today, yesterday, week, last_week, month, last_month, year, last_year.
Admin only. Get attendance records for all users or filtered by userId.
Admin only. Initialize attendance records for today for all active employees.

Attendance module access. **Applicants**: own requests; optional `status` filter (`pending` | `approved` | `rejected`). **Attendance admin / global admin**: may filter by `userId`, `dateFrom`, `dateTo` (ISO dates).
Attendance module access. Body: `attendanceId` (UUID of the attendance row), `reason`. Creates a pending reconciliation request (e.g. late check-in justification).
Authorized reviewers only (attendance admin scope / policy in backend). Body: `status` — `approved` or `rejected`; optional `reviewNote`.

item.name: Leaves
item.description: Authenticated users on most routes. See collection **info** for balances, `/all`, approve/reject, and HR vs global admin.

request.description: Get all active leave types.
Global **admin** or **HR module** access. Inactive types included.

Apply for leave. **durationType** (required): `single_day` | `half_day` | `multiple_day`. For `single_day`/`half_day` set `startDate` and same `endDate` if needed; for `multiple_day` set both dates. For **half_day** add `halfDayPeriod`: `first_half` | `second_half`. Conflicting dates return 400 with `conflicts`. Extra days beyond quota are stored as `additionalLeaveDays` on the leave.

**Global admin OR HR module access** (not Sales). Query: **startDate**, **endDate** (YYYY-MM-DD), **userIds** (comma-separated).

item.name: RFQ
item.description: Request For Quotation workflow with iteration/version tracking. Includes reopen + historical snapshots.
